dungeon.jp: 飛天の塔【ベリーハード】1階

description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) At the start of battle, ignores Resilience to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the enemy with the highest Speed for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Pureblood's Dominion</color> to all allies. These effects cannot be removed.\n\n(Active Effect) Attacks all enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、最もスピードが高い敵単体に効果抵抗を無視する<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。味方全体には<color=#28d9ed>鮮血の領域</color>を付与する。これらの効果は解除されない。\n\n(アクティブ効果)敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 전투 시작 시 속도가 가장 빠른 적 한 명에게 대상의 효과 저항을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다. 아군 전체에게는 <color=#28d9ed>선혈의 영역</color>을 부여합니다. 이 효과들은 해제되지 않습니다.\n\n(액티브 효과) 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)战斗开始时,使速度最高的一名敌人无视目标的效果抵抗,并造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>鲜血领域</color>效果。这些效果不会被解除。\n\n(主动效果)攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: When using this skill, removes <color=#28d9ed>2</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, and attacks all enemies. When the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>, deals increased damage and after using this skill, inflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: スキル使用時、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[Buff_V_tower_very_hard_boss_2000035_3_3個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合ダメージがUPし、スキル使用後<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 피해가 증가하고 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 使用技能时,解除全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>2个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则使伤害提升,并在使用技能后使<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen an Inferior Core is alive, grants an irremovable <color=#28d9ed>reduced damage taken</color> and reduces Weakness Gauge taken by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦場に【劣化コア】がいる場合、解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>ダメージDOWN</color>効果を付与し、WGのダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n열화 코어 생존 시 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>피해 감소</color>효과가 적용 되며, WG 피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n烈火核心幸存时,获得无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>伤害降低</color>效果,WG伤害量降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
